tasks.label: a11y: pa11y-ci all pages
args: set -euo pipefail; python3 -m http.server 4173 >/tmp/paul-site-a11y.log 2>&1 & SERVER_PID=$!; trap 'kill $SERVER_PID' EXIT; npx --yes pa11y-ci http://127.0.0.1:4173/index.html http://127.0.0.1:4173/about.html http://127.0.0.1:4173/projects.html http://127.0.0.1:4173/resume.html http://127.0.0.1:4173/contact.html
